title: centrolepis caespitosa
intro: Centrolepis caespitosa, a type of small, delicate grass-like plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Centrolepidaceae. Native to New Zealand, this plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Centrolepis caespitosa include its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate respiratory issues. Centrolepis caespitosa can be prepared as a tea or infused in hot water to make a medicinal decoction, and it has also been used in traditional Māori medicine for its various health benefits.
